uses: I couldn't find any information about the plant Pothuava triticina, however I found information about the plant Puccinia triticina. Puccinia triticina is a parasitic fungus known to cause a disease called stem rust in wheat and other grasses. Puccinia triticina has no known medicinal uses. There is limited research on its effects on human health. It primarily affects the plant's immune system rather than being used for medicinal purposes.
